arts.ttl: Major Man United injury update: What's the latest on Tyrell Malacia?
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Tyrell Malacia was able to take part in the warm-up section of his team's training session on Friday.

arts.ttl: Revealed: The blockbuster transfer target Man United 'missed out on during the summer window' despite Erik ten Hag's spending spree
arts.sum: United brought in five new additions before the market slammed shut, strengthening several positions in their bid to win more trophies.

arts.ttl: Manchester United get major injury boost as 11 squad members for Crystal Palace fixture confirmed
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund hasn't played for Man Utd so far this season but the Dane is in the squad to face Crystal Palace on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Manchester United injury update on two first-team defenders ahead of Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Man Utd defenders Tyrell Malacia and Victor Lindelof are yet to make appearances this season due to injury.

arts.ttl: Man Utd offered chance to realise Ratcliffe's 'next Mbappe' dream
arts.sum: Kane has started the season on fire, netting four goals against Dinamo Zagreb earlier this week, and new Bayern boss Vincent Kompany has rarely utilised Tel as a result. Tel himself has admitted that he did not perform particularly well when given chances under Kompany, but BILD claim that a January exit could become an increasingly concrete topic should his lack of game time continue.

arts.ttl: Team News: Crystal Palace vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Continue the story of Selhurst with Nketiah, Glasner & more in Man Utd programme
arts.sum: Our season-long celebration of 100 years of Selhurst Park continues in the Crystal Palace v Manchester United matchday programme, on sale NOW!

arts.ttl: Ineos deliver fresh Man United mega stadium hint with £1.4bn Old Trafford blueprint already clear
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe wants Manchester United's new stadium to be one of the biggest in Europe and already has two blueprints

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag makes Rasmus Hojlund & Mason Mount promise ahead of injury returns
arts.sum: Hojlund hasn't played at all this season since picking up an injury during the summer, while Mount's last appearance came in the second week of the campaign, but both were back in training this week and are in line to return in Saturday's trip to Crystal Palace. Erik ten Hag has vowed not to take any risks with Rasmus Hojlund and Mason Mount after the pair returned to Manchester United training.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner insists there's more to come from Crystal Palace's answer to Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Only Erling Haaland has scored more goals than Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta since Oliver Glasner was appointed at Selhurst Park in February
